title: viola palmata var. pedatifida
intro: Viola palmata var. pedatifida is a lesser-known variant of the viola palmata, a perennial flowering plant in the violet family (Violaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The leaves and flowers of Viola palmata var. pedatifida have been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Viola palmata var. pedatifida can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion.
